description_long: This is a wooden fence section composed of two sturdy horizontal rails supporting a series of evenly spaced vertical pickets. The pickets are rectangular with flat tops, and the entire structure is framed by two thicker end posts that extend slightly beyond the rails. The wood appears to be unfinished or lightly stained, giving it a natural, warm brown color. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, and the design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for marking boundaries or enclosing spaces in urban parks, gardens, or residential areas. The construction suggests it is lightweight and likely intended for temporary or movable use. The open gaps between the pickets allow visibility and airflow while still providing a clear linear barrier.
description: A simple, flat-topped wooden fence section with evenly spaced vertical pickets and two horizontal rails, framed by thicker end posts. The design is utilitarian and natural, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, with all vertical pickets and both end posts visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the pickets and the thickness of the end post.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the same arrangement of pickets and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the end post.
